TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tilebes u tilebes a kilang takalaw ku langaw nu tatapangan, caay ka talaw tu suemeday(sengetay) atu aheciday a lala' atu bail. kalamkam a mulahad, caay katalaw tu kedal atu baliyus, tatenga' kalulidung nu zazan, malukinaulan, satena' tu bail i bayubayuan, nay lala'ay nu Taywan ku lalengawan niza. Paculil tu kazizeng i Kaw-su-kung-lu, Yadah ku langaw nu tilebes i lilies nu zazan. ÁĒ®ťÄĒ u heci sa, sasapaiyuen, u " hung-ling-ce" han ku ngangan i kangpuyaku. siledek ku lamit atu pudac, mangaleb ku ledek nu heci, anu makaen, muta', baluebu ku bili, masinawal, mabulekut, makema a mahukid(mapatay). salengacaay ku kines nu tilebes, akenekay, Sisa, " Ťč¶ś•Ě" han nu hulam pangangan. sasapaden ngaay sapibacal, misanga' tu haku, pakaysingan, bankuy. u ngaayay ku tilebus a kilang. takalaw ku langaw nu tilebus. siciid tu sadingsingan, siheci tu balangbangan, Kasienawan mahetikatu ku papah, u caang tu dada'. i lalud sa, yadah ku dadayday micekaw i kilang a mudadiw, kakiluma'an nu dadayday ku tilebus a kilang. u zuma sa,ngaay sakinaulen, kasibaluan macela tu talangitangay a balu, malikat ku langdaw nu heci, mazuhemtu mala takuliyawaytu ku heci, kanamuhan a minaul. palumaen i dabek nu niyazu' tu kakibana'an tu puu' nu mihecaan.
S.PHON: tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs u tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs a kir~…ĺaŇč takar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tatapaŇčan, ¶aaj ka tar~…ĺaw tu su…ôm…ôdaj(s…ôŇč…ôtaj) atu ańß…ô ¶idaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu bair~…ĺ. kar~…ĺamkam a mur~…ĺańßad, ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu k…ôdar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺijus, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° kar~…ĺur~…ĺiduŇč nu zazan, mar~…ĺukinaur~…ĺan, sat…ôna Ē~ ° tu bair~…ĺ i bajubajuan, naj r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj nu tajwan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčawan niza. pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu kaziz…ôŇč i kaw-su-kuŇč-r~…ĺu, jadańß ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs i r~…ĺir~…ĺi…ôs nu zazan. ** u ńß…ô ¶i sa, sasapaiju…ôn, u " ńßuŇč-r~…ĺiŇč- ¶…ô" ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan i kaŇčpujaku. sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku r~…ĺamit atu puda ¶, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk nu ńß…ô ¶i, anu maka…ôn, muta Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu…ôbu ku bir~…ĺi, masinawar~…ĺ, mabur~…ĺ…ôkut, mak…ôma a mańßukid(mapataj). sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aaj ku kin…ôs nu tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs, ak…ôn…ôkaj, sisa, " **" ńßan nu ńßur~…ĺam paŇčaŇčan. sasapad…ôn Ňčaaj sapiba ¶ar~…ĺ, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ńßaku, pakajsiŇčan, bankuj. u Ňčaajaj ku tir~…ĺ…ôbus a kir~…ĺaŇč. takar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tir~…ĺ…ôbus. si ¶iid tu sadiŇčsiŇčan, sińß…ô ¶i tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan, kasi…ônawan mańß…ôtikatu ku papańß, u ¶aaŇč tu dada Ē~ °. i r~…ĺar~…ĺud sa, jadańß ku dadajdaj mi ¶…ôkaw i kir~…ĺaŇč a mudadiw, kakir~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu dadajdaj ku tir~…ĺ…ôbus a kir~…ĺaŇč. u zuma sa,Ňčaaj sakinaur~…ĺ…ôn, kasibar~…ĺuan ma ¶…ôr~…ĺa tu tar~…ĺaŇčitaŇčaj a bar~…ĺu, mar~…ĺikat ku r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu ńß…ô ¶i, mazuńß…ômtu mar~…ĺa takur~…ĺijawajtu ku ńß…ô ¶i, kanamuńßan a minaur~…ĺ. par~…ĺuma…ôn i dab…ôk nu nijazu Ē~ ° tu kakibana Ē~ °an tu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß…ô ¶aan.
S.FORM: tilebes u tilebes a kilang takalaw ku langaw nu tatapangan, caay ka talaw tu suemeday(sengetay) atu aheciday a lala' atu bail. kalamkam a mulahad, caay katalaw tu kedal atu baliyus, tatenga' kalulidung nu zazan, malukinaulan, satena' tu bail i bayubayuan, nay lala'ay nu Taywan ku lalengawan niza. Paculil tu kazizeng i Kaw-su-kung-lu, Yadah ku langaw nu tilebes i lilies nu zazan. ÁĒ®ťÄĒ u heci sa, sasapaiyuen, u " hung-ling-ce" han ku ngangan i kangpuyaku. siledek ku lamit atu pudac, mangaleb ku ledek nu heci, anu makaen, muta', baluebu ku bili, masinawal, mabulekut, makema a mahukid(mapatay). salengacaay ku kines nu tilebes, akenekay, Sisa, " Ťč¶ś•Ě" han nu hulam pangangan. sasapaden ngaay sapibacal, misanga' tu haku, pakaysingan, bankuy. u ngaayay ku tilebus a kilang. takalaw ku langaw nu tilebus. siciid tu sadingsingan, siheci tu balangbangan, Kasienawan mahetikatu ku papah, u caang tu dada'. i lalud sa, yadah ku dadayday micekaw i kilang a mudadiw, kakiluma'an nu dadayday ku tilebus a kilang. u zuma sa,ngaay sakinaulen, kasibaluan macela tu talangitangay a balu, malikat ku langdaw nu heci, mazuhemtu mala takuliyawaytu ku heci, kanamuhan a minaul. palumaen i dabek nu niyazu' tu kakibana'an tu puu' nu mihecaan.
S.PHON: tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs u tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs a kir~…ĺaŇč takar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tatapaŇčan, ¶aaj ka tar~…ĺaw tu su…ôm…ôdaj(s…ôŇč…ôtaj) atu ańß…ô ¶idaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu bair~…ĺ. kar~…ĺamkam a mur~…ĺańßad, ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu k…ôdar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺijus, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° kar~…ĺur~…ĺiduŇč nu zazan, mar~…ĺukinaur~…ĺan, sat…ôna Ē~ ° tu bair~…ĺ i bajubajuan, naj r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj nu tajwan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčawan niza. pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu kaziz…ôŇč i kaw-su-kuŇč-r~…ĺu, jadańß ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs i r~…ĺir~…ĺi…ôs nu zazan. ** u ńß…ô ¶i sa, sasapaiju…ôn, u " ńßuŇč-r~…ĺiŇč- ¶…ô" ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan i kaŇčpujaku. sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku r~…ĺamit atu puda ¶, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk nu ńß…ô ¶i, anu maka…ôn, muta Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu…ôbu ku bir~…ĺi, masinawar~…ĺ, mabur~…ĺ…ôkut, mak…ôma a mańßukid(mapataj). sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aaj ku kin…ôs nu tir~…ĺ…ôb…ôs, ak…ôn…ôkaj, sisa, " **" ńßan nu ńßur~…ĺam paŇčaŇčan. sasapad…ôn Ňčaaj sapiba ¶ar~…ĺ, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ńßaku, pakajsiŇčan, bankuj. u Ňčaajaj ku tir~…ĺ…ôbus a kir~…ĺaŇč. takar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tir~…ĺ…ôbus. si ¶iid tu sadiŇčsiŇčan, sińß…ô ¶i tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan, kasi…ônawan mańß…ôtikatu ku papańß, u ¶aaŇč tu dada Ē~ °. i r~…ĺar~…ĺud sa, jadańß ku dadajdaj mi ¶…ôkaw i kir~…ĺaŇč a mudadiw, kakir~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu dadajdaj ku tir~…ĺ…ôbus a kir~…ĺaŇč. u zuma sa,Ňčaaj sakinaur~…ĺ…ôn, kasibar~…ĺuan ma ¶…ôr~…ĺa tu tar~…ĺaŇčitaŇčaj a bar~…ĺu, mar~…ĺikat ku r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu ńß…ô ¶i, mazuńß…ômtu mar~…ĺa takur~…ĺijawajtu ku ńß…ô ¶i, kanamuńßan a minaur~…ĺ. par~…ĺuma…ôn i dab…ôk nu nijazu Ē~ ° tu kakibana Ē~ °an tu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß…ô ¶aan.
